name: Panic of 1907
description: Panic of 1907; Knickerbocker Trust collapse; J.P. Morgan organized rescue. DJIA peak-to-trough.

name: Pre-WWI bear
description: Long grinding decline through 1910-13 recession into WWI; NYSE closed Jul-Dec 1914.

name: WWI bear
description: WWI deepens; US entry; war-economy uncertainty caused DJIA to lose ~40%.

name: Post-WWI depression
description: Post-WWI deflation depression (1920-21); commodity collapse; Fed tightening.

name: Wall Street Crash / Great Depression
description: Worst bear market in modern history. Stocks lost ~86% over ~3 years; Great Depression.

name: Recession of 1937-38
description: Roosevelt recession; premature fiscal/monetary tightening within Great Depression.

name: WWII bear
description: Pre/early-WWII bear market; European war fears and Pearl Harbor; recovery during WWII.

name: Post-WWII bear
description: Post-WWII demobilization; price controls lifted; 1948-49 recession.

name: 1956-57 bear
description: 1957-58 recession concurrent; Sputnik launch; monetary tightening.

name: 1961-62 'Kennedy slide'
description: Kennedy slide; steel-price showdown with US Steel; flash crash 28 May 1962.

name: 1966 credit crunch
description: Credit crunch of 1966; Fed tightening; Vietnam War escalation; no NBER recession.

name: 1968-70 bear
description: Rising inflation; Vietnam War; 1969-70 recession; conglomerate bust.

name: 1973-74 oil crisis
description: OPEC oil embargo; Watergate; stagflation; worst bear since 1929-32 in real terms.

name: 1980-82 Volcker bear
description: Volcker disinflation; double-dip 1980 and 1981-82 recessions; back-to-back recessions.

name: Black Monday
description: Black Monday 19 Oct 1987 single-day 22.6% DJIA drop; portfolio insurance; program trading.

name: Gulf War bear
description: Iraq invades Kuwait; oil price spike; S&P touched -19.9% (~bear on intraday/DJIA basis); 1990-91 recession.

name: 1998 Russia/LTCM
description: Russian default; LTCM hedge-fund collapse; S&P fell ~19% (~bear by intraday); brief but sharp.

name: Dot-com crash
description: Dot-com bubble burst; 9/11 attacks; corporate accounting scandals; 2001 recession.

name: Global Financial Crisis
description: Subprime mortgage crisis; Lehman collapse Sep 2008; Great Recession; worst since 1937-38.

name: 2011 European debt
description: S&P intraday touched -21.6%; Euro area debt crisis; US debt-ceiling/S&P downgrade; brief bear.

name: 2018 Q4 selloff
description: Fed tightening; trade war; touched -19.8% close basis; -20.2% intraday; commonly counted as bear.

name: COVID-19 crash
description: COVID-19 pandemic; fastest bear in history (~1 month); recession Feb-Apr 2020.

name: 2022 Fed tightening
description: Fed aggressive tightening vs. inflation; war in Ukraine; tech-led decline; no recession.

name: 2025 Tariff shock
description: Trump tariff announcement 2 Apr 2025; brief sharp drawdown; intraday touched -23% from Feb high; recovered within months.
